messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: On it. Stripe dashboard: webhook delivery failure rate 100%, all returning HTTP 400. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: henry_silva
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Root cause: Stripe SDK v3.0.0 changed Webhook.construct_event() to require raw request bytes.... Rolling back.

messages.author: bob_martinez
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
